---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0;">

# Jacky Man

## Data, strategy, and practical problem solving

I work across analytics, business strategy, and execution, with a focus on turning data into clear decisions and measurable outcomes.

<p style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="Projects.qmd" style="margin-right: 14px;">View Projects</a>
  <a href="about.qmd" style="margin-right: 14px;">About Me</a>
  <a href="Contact.qmd">Get in Touch</a>
</p>

</div>

---

## What I Do

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Analytics  
Using data to uncover trends, explain performance, and identify opportunity.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Strategy  
Connecting insights to practical recommendations that support growth.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Execution  
Focusing on actions that are clear, useful, and results driven.
:::

:::

---

## More Than Work

I’m also a points and miles hobbyist and a hands on home DIYer.

I enjoy optimizing travel rewards, finding smart ways to maximize value, and taking on projects at home that combine creativity with problem solving.

---

## Explore the Site

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="25%"}
### About  
Learn more about my background and approach.  

[Go to About](about.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Projects  
A look at selected work across analytics and strategy.  

[Go to Projects](Projects.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
### CV  
View my experience and background.  

[Go to CV](CV.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Contact  
Reach out to connect or collaborate.  

[Go to Contact](Contact.qmd)
:::

:::
